parameters.query:
SELECT 
  s.scan_id, s.scanned_at, s.date_from, s.date_to, s.form_name,
  s.total_tickets, s.total_topics, s.coverage_score,
  s.deflection_rate, s.kb_availability, s.kb_linking,
  s.kb_usage, s.non_kb, s.high_priority, s.medium_priority,
  json_agg(
    json_build_object(
      'topic_name', sec.topic_name,
      'section_feature', sec.section_feature,
      'ticket_count', sec.ticket_count,
      'pct_of_total', sec.pct_of_total,
      'gap_type', sec.gap_type,
      'gap_summary', sec.gap_summary,
      'recommended_action', sec.recommended_action,
      'priority', sec.priority,
      'deflection_potential', sec.deflection_potential,
      'kcs_adoption_pct', sec.kcs_adoption_pct
    ) ORDER BY sec.ticket_count DESC
  ) as sections
FROM kbg_scans s
JOIN kbg_sections sec ON sec.scan_id = s.scan_id
WHERE (
  '{{ $json.form_name }}' = ''
  OR s.form_name = '{{ $json.form_name }}'
)
AND s.scanned_at = (
  SELECT MAX(s2.scanned_at) FROM kbg_scans s2
  WHERE (
    '{{ $json.form_name }}' = ''
    OR s2.form_name = '{{ $json.form_name }}'
  )
)
GROUP BY s.scan_id, s.scanned_at, s.date_from, s.date_to, s.form_name,
  s.total_tickets, s.total_topics, s.coverage_score,
  s.deflection_rate, s.kb_availability, s.kb_linking,
  s.kb_usage, s.non_kb, s.high_priority, s.medium_priority;

SELECT
  COUNT(*) as total_tickets,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN status IN ('solved', 'closed') THEN 1 END) as solved_tickets,
  ROUND(AVG(full_resolution_time_business_minutes)::numeric / 60, 1) as avg_resolution_hours,
  ROUND(
    SUM(CASE WHEN sla_breached_flag = true THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)::numeric 
    / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) * 100, 1
  ) as sla_breach_pct,
  ROUND(
    SUM(CASE WHEN article_linked_flag = true THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)::numeric 
    / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) * 100, 1
  ) as article_link_pct,
  ROUND(
    SUM(CASE WHEN csat_score = 'good' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)::numeric 
    / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN csat_score IN ('good', 'bad') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) * 100, 1
  ) as csat_pct,
  SUM(CASE WHEN csat_score IN ('good', 'bad') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as csat_responses
FROM support_ticket_metrics_fact
WHERE (
  '{{ $('Code - Parse Query Context').first().json.form_name }}' = ''
  OR form_id = CASE '{{ $('Code - Parse Query Context').first().json.form_name }}'
    WHEN 'EMR'        THEN 1900001563224
    WHEN 'Lab'        THEN 32729757998235
    WHEN 'CRM'        THEN 1260812421569
    WHEN 'Accounting' THEN 5374649379867
    ELSE NULL
  END
)
AND (
  '{{ $('Code - Parse Query Context').first().json.date_from }}' = ''
  OR ticket_created_at >= '{{ $('Code - Parse Query Context').first().json.date_from }}'
)
AND (
  '{{ $('Code - Parse Query Context').first().json.date_to }}' = ''
  OR ticket_created_at <= '{{ $('Code - Parse Query Context').first().json.date_to }}'
);

parameters.name: system_prompt
parameters.value:
You are a query parameter extractor for a support analytics system. Given a natural language question, extract filter parameters and return ONLY a valid JSON object — no markdown, no explanation:
{
 "form_name": string or "",
 "date_from": string (YYYY-MM-DD) or "",
 "date_to": string (YYYY-MM-DD) or ""
}

Available forms: EMR, CRM, Lab, Accounting. Return the matching form if mentioned or clearly implied. Return "" if none specified.

For dates: infer from natural language. Today is 2026-04-08. Use your judgment — for example "Q1" means the first quarter of the current or most recently mentioned year, "last month" means March 2026, "this year" means 2026-01-01 to today. Return "" for both date fields if no time period is mentioned or implied.

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO kb_article_embeddings (
  article_id, title, body_text, section_id, url,
  outdated, draft, embedding, embedded_at, updated_at, source
) VALUES (
  {{ $json.article_id }},
  '{{ $json.title.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.body_text.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  {{ $json.section_id }},
  '{{ $json.url }}',
  {{ $json.outdated }},
  {{ $json.draft }},
  '{{ $json.embedding }}'::vector,
  '{{ $json.embedded_at }}',
  '{{ $json.updated_at }}',
  'emr'
)
ON CONFLICT (article_id, source) DO UPDATE SET
  title = EXCLUDED.title,
  body_text = EXCLUDED.body_text,
  embedding = EXCLUDED.embedding,
  outdated = EXCLUDED.outdated,
  embedded_at = EXCLUDED.embedded_at,
  updated_at = EXCLUDED.updated_at;

SELECT 
  article_id,
  title,
  url,
  outdated,
  ROUND((1 - (embedding <=> ('[' || '{{ $json.data[0].embedding }}' || ']')::vector))::numeric, 3) as similarity
FROM kb_article_embeddings
WHERE outdated = false
ORDER BY embedding <=> ('[' || '{{ $json.data[0].embedding }}' || ']')::vector
LIMIT 5;

INSERT INTO kb_embed_log (articles_embedded, status)
SELECT COUNT(*), 'success' FROM kb_article_embeddings;

nodes.name: Respond to Webhook - KB Embed Sync

parameters.query:
SELECT 
  json_agg(
    json_build_object(
      'article_id', article_id,
      'title', title,
      'url', url,
      'outdated', outdated,
      'similarity', ROUND((1 - (embedding <=> ('[' || '{{ $json.data[0].embedding }}' || ']')::vector))::numeric, 3)
    ) ORDER BY embedding <=> ('[' || '{{ $json.data[0].embedding }}' || ']')::vector
  ) as articles
FROM (
  SELECT article_id, title, url, outdated, embedding
  FROM kb_article_embeddings
  WHERE outdated = false
  ORDER BY embedding <=> ('[' || '{{ $json.data[0].embedding }}' || ']')::vector
  LIMIT 5
) sub;

INSERT INTO kb_coverage_results (ticket_id, coverage, top_similarity, top_article_id, top_article_title, summary)
VALUES (
  {{ $json.ticket_id }},
  '{{ $json.coverage }}',
  {{ $json.articles.length > 0 ? $json.articles[0].similarity : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.articles.length > 0 ? $json.articles[0].article_id : 'NULL' }},
  '{{ $json.articles.length > 0 ? $json.articles[0].title.replace(/'/g, "''") : '' }}',
  '{{ $json.issue_summary ? $json.issue_summary.replace(/'/g, "''") : '' }}'
)
ON CONFLICT (ticket_id) DO UPDATE SET
  coverage = EXCLUDED.coverage,
  top_similarity = EXCLUDED.top_similarity,
  top_article_id = EXCLUDED.top_article_id,
  top_article_title = EXCLUDED.top_article_title,
  summary = EXCLUDED.summary,
  scanned_at = NOW();
